document.purpose: Quick rules & patterns cheat sheet. For full details, READ the referenced docs — DO NOT guess.
read_order: AGENTS.md — Guardrails, CSR rules, code quality
docs/1_ARCHITECTURE.md — System design, data model, invariants
docs/4_DEPLOYMENT.md — Docker topology, env vars, health
docs/7_CURRENT_SETTINGS.json — All current defaults and config

doc_guide.1_ARCHITECTURE.md: Tech stack, data model, CSR, delete policy, AI provider
doc_guide.2.2_WORKFLOWS_CHAT.md: Chat retrieval, cache layers, neighbor expansion
doc_guide.7_CURRENT_SETTINGS.json: All defaults, env vars, runtime params

must_know.hard_delete_order: registry.delete() → vectors → sections → file → DB row → purge. Sections BEFORE DB row.
must_know.retrieval: Hybrid (dense+BM25 RRF) → section grouping (≥0.25) → dedup → rerank (TEI) → neighbor expansion → full section to LLM. See 2.2_WORKFLOWS_CHAT.md
must_know.api_gateway: Browser → /api/bep/ → Next.js Route Handler → getToken() → Bearer → backend. Token NEVER exposed to browser.
must_know.provider_boundary: Routes NEVER call AI provider SDK directly. ChatService owns orchestration. See 1_ARCHITECTURE.md
must_know.teI_inference: Embedding: ai-embedding (gte-multilingual-base, 768-dim, port 7997). Reranker: ai-reranker (gte-multilingual-reranker-base, port 7998). Both TEI containers.
must_know.async_rules: All I/O = async def + await. CPU-bound = asyncio.to_thread(). Celery → asyncio.run() at entry only.
must_know.csr_layers: Route (HTTP) → Service (logic, raises ValueError/RuntimeError) → Repository (SQL, returns dicts). See 1_ARCHITECTURE.md

key_rules.rechunk: POST /documents/{id}/rechunk — if ocr_output.md in S3 → free rechunk; else → retry LlamaParse. Single RefreshCw button.
key_rules.single_chunking: SentenceSplitter in LlamaIngestionPipeline only. No double-splitting.
key_rules.confidence: high: max≥0.7 AND avg≥0.5 | medium: max≥0.4 | low: max<0.4
key_rules.history_limit: AI_MAX_HISTORY_MESSAGES=10 (messages sent to LLM per turn)

anti_patterns: direct provider SDK calls in routes
SessionLocal in route files (use Repository via Service)

data_location.chunks: Qdrant → dense + sparse-bm25 vectors, section_id metadata

removed.ai_engine: Removed — replaced by TEI containers (ai-embedding, ai-reranker)

run_commands.lint: python -m black app --line-length=120 && python -m flake8 app --select=F,E1,E2,E4,E9,W --ignore=E203,E501,W293,W292,W391,W503,W504
